command:
uv run python -c 
from tasks.t0029_distal_dendrite_length_sweep_dsgc.code.trial_runner_length import build_cell_context
ctx = build_cell_context()
h = ctx.h
print('type of h.RGC.soma:', type(h.RGC.soma))
print('has iter:', hasattr(h.RGC.soma, '__iter__'))
# Try iteration
try:
    items = list(h.RGC.soma)
    print('first item:', items[0], type(items[0]))
except Exception as e:
    print('iteration failed:', e)
# Try as Section directly
try:
    print('name:', h.RGC.soma.name())
except Exception as e:
    print('name failed:', e)
